zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Leycaster於大約1390年出生在英國英格蘭爾米德列維其。她於1409年與William Mainwaring在英國爾米德列維其結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1464年在她的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾米德列維其聖 邁克爾 安德 哥吉拉 安爾也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Leycaster
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Leycaster was born about 1390, in Middlewich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. She married William Mainwaring in 1409, in Middlewich, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1464, in her hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in St Michael And All Angels' Church, Middlewich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.Saint Michael and All Angels Church, Mid: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 미들루이치 스트 믹하얼 앤드 앨 앤그스' c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Leycaster(은)는 대략 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 미들루이치에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1409년 영국 체실르 미들루이치에서 William Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1464년 그녀의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 미들루이치 스트 믹하얼 앤드 앨 앤그스' c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Leycaster родилась около 1390 г. в местности миддльвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Mainwaring в 1409 г. в местности миддльвич, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1464 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности ст мачаел анд алл ангелс' чурч, миддльвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
